articles.title: US Stock Futures Continue Decline: S&P 500 E-Minis Down 1.80%, Nasdaq Falls 2.10%
articles.description: US stock futures continue their decline with S&P 500 E-Minis down 1.80% and Nasdaq futures falling 2.10%. The continued weakness in pre-market trading suggests ongoing market volatility and potential pressure on both broad market and technology stocks when regular trading commences.
articles.content:
US stock futures are experiencing continued downward momentum, with major indices posting notable declines in pre-market trading activity.
Market Performance Overview
The futures market is showing signs of sustained weakness across key benchmarks:

articles.title: Playbook Partners leads a $11 million round in enterprise technology firm KaarTech
articles.description: Through this infusion, Playbook Partners joins existing investors like Mumbai-based A91 Partners, which currently owns around 30% in the firm. A91 Partners had invested $30 million into KaarTech in 2023. The round valued KaarTech at Rs 2,000 crore.
articles.content:

articles.title: AI Labs Introduces AI-Assisted Crypto Trading Platform Focused on Data Analysis and Automated Execution
articles.description: SINGAPORE, March 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AI Labs, an AI-driven crypto trading technology company backed by Academic Labs, announced the launch of an AI-assisted platform designed to help cryptocurrency traders analyze market data and respond more efficiently to changing market conditions. As automated tools and algorithmic strategies become more common in global digital asset markets, the platform integrates visual analysis, narrative data monitoring, and automated trade execution features intended to support more structured and data-driven trading decisions.

articles.title: Why China May Be the Quiet Winner of the Iran War
articles.description: Beijing aims to assert its diplomatic role, mediating talks in the region and controlling rare earth exports critical for military technology, Middle East, Times Now
articles.content: Beijing did not fire a single shot in the US-Israel strike on Iran. It condemned the attacks, evacuated its citizens, and sent its foreign minister to make phone calls to both sides. And yet, in the days since Operation Epic Fury began on February 28... [9192 chars]

articles.title: Jalandhar alumnus cracks UPSC civil services examination
articles.description: Akash Kumar, an alumnus of Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology Jalandhar has cracked the prestigious UPSC civil services examination by securing an All India Rank (AIR) 789, bringing laurels to the institute.
articles.content:
Akash Kumar, an alumnus of Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology Jalandhar has cracked the prestigious UPSC civil services examination by securing an All India Rank (AIR) 789, bringing laurels to the institute.

articles.title: Why Some Of Battlestar Galactica's Technology Seems Unadvanced
articles.description: Technology on Battlestar Galactica did not include the sleek touch-screens often seen in sci-fi. Here's why the show's tech wasn't particularly advanced.
articles.content: The goal of the reimagined "Battlestar Galactica" was to create a space opera that stayed relatively close to reality. Series' co-creator Ronald D. Moore, who wanted to write the stories he never could on "Star Trek," coined the style as "naturalisti... [3523 chars]
